channel.title: ByteByteGo Newsletter
channel.description: Explain complex systems with simple terms, from the authors of the best-selling system design book series. Join over 1,000,000 friendly readers.

item.title: 【How Stripe Detects Fraudulent Transactions Within 100 ms】Stripe 如何在 100 毫秒内检测欺诈交易
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how Stripe’s Radar does this effectively and the architectural decisions the team took while building it.】在本文中，我们将了解 Stripe 的 Radar 如何有效地做到这一点，以及团队在构建它时采取的架构决策。

item.title: 【How Amazon Uses LLMs to Recommend Products】亚马逊如何利用法学硕士来推荐产品
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how COSMO works and the challenges the engineering team faced.】在本文中，我们将了解 COSMO 的工作原理以及工程团队面临的挑战。

item.title: 【EP212: Data Warehouse vs Data Lake vs Data Mesh】EP212：数据仓库、数据湖、数据网格
item.description: 【Storing data is the easy part. Deciding where and how to organize it is the real challenge.】存储数据是最简单的部分。决定在哪里以及如何组织它是真正的挑战。

item.title: 【B-Trees vs LSM Trees: Comparison and Trade-Offs】B 树与 LSM 树：比较和权衡
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at B-Trees and LSM trees in detail, along with the trade-offs associated with each of them.】在本文中，我们将详细介绍 B 树和 LSM 树，以及与它们相关的权衡。

item.title: 【How DoorDash Launches a New Country in One Week】DoorDash 如何在一周内推出一个新国家/地区
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how this architecture was designed and the challenges they faced.】在本文中，我们将了解该架构是如何设计的以及他们面临的挑战。

item.title: 【The Security Architecture of GitHub Agentic Workflow】GitHub代理工作流的安全架构
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how GitHub built a security architecture that assumes the agent is already compromised.】在本文中，我们将了解 GitHub 如何构建假设代理已受到威胁的安全架构。

item.title: 【EP211: How the JVM Works】EP211：JVM 如何工作
item.description: 【We compile, run, and debug Java code all the time. But what exactly does the JVM do between compile and run?】我们一直在编译、运行和调试 Java 代码。但是 JVM 在编译和运行之间到底做了什么？

item.title: 【A Guide to Relational Database Design】关系数据库设计指南
item.description: 【In this article, we cover the core concepts that inform those decisions. We’ll look at tables, keys, relationships, normalization, and joins, with each concept building on the last.】在本文中，我们将介绍影响这些决策的核心概念。我们将研究表、键、关系、规范化和连接，每个概念都建立在最后一个概念的基础上。

item.title: 【Figma Design to Code, Code to Design: Clearly Explained】Figma 从设计到代码，从代码到设计：清晰解释
item.description: 【This article covers how Figma’s design-to-code and code-to-design workflows actually work, starting with why the obvious approaches fail, how MCP solves them, and the engineering challenges that remain.】本文介绍 Figma 的设计到代码和代码到设计工作流程的实际工作方式，首先介绍为什么明显的方法会失败、MCP 如何解决这些问题以及仍然存在的工程挑战。

item.title: 【How LinkedIn Feed Uses LLMs to Serve 1.3 Billion Users】LinkedIn Feed 如何利用法学硕士为 13 亿用户提供服务
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how the LinkedIn engineering team rebuilt the Feed and the challenges they faced.】在本文中，我们将了解 LinkedIn 工程团队如何重建 Feed 以及他们面临的挑战。
